languages.text: "Я думал, что {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}герой Империума{/d} будет мне комиссарскую брехню про богоизбранность аристократии говорить. Теперь понимаю, за что вас простые люди героем считают".
"I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."
languages.original_text: "Я думал, что {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}герой Империума{/d} будет мне комиссарскую брехню про богоизбранность аристократии говорить. Теперь понимаю, за что вас простые люди героем считают".

traits.locale_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar's claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."
"I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar's claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."
"I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."
"I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

languages.text: “我还以为{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国的英雄{/d}会对我说一堆天赋贵族神权的政委式的空话。现在我明白为什么平民会管您叫英雄了。”
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: “我还以为{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国的英雄{/d}会对我说一堆天赋贵族神权的政委式的空话。现在我明白为什么平民会管您叫英雄了。”

languages.text: "Bir {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}İmparatorluk kahramanının{/d} bana soyluların ilahi hakkı hakkında komiser zırvası uyduracağını sanmıştım. Avamın size neden kahraman dediğini şimdi anlıyorum."
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: "Bir {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}İmparatorluk kahramanının{/d} bana soyluların ilahi hakkı hakkında komiser zırvası uyduracağını sanmıştım. Avamın size neden kahraman dediğini şimdi anlıyorum."

languages.text: « Je pensais qu'{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|un héros|une héroïne} de l'Imperium{/d} me servirait le refrain habituel sur le devoir divin des nobles. Je comprends mieux pourquoi on vous qualifie {mf|de héros|d'héroïne}. »
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: « Je pensais qu'{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|un héros|une héroïne} de l'Imperium{/d} me servirait le refrain habituel sur le devoir divin des nobles. Je comprends mieux pourquoi on vous qualifie {mf|de héros|d'héroïne}. »

languages.text: «Creía que un{mf||a} {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|héroe|heroína} del Imperium{/d} me soltaría basura de Comisario sobre los derechos divinos de los nobles. Ahora entiendo por qué el pueblo llano l{mf|e|a} considera {mf|un héroe|una heroína}».
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: «Creía que un{mf||a} {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}{mf|héroe|heroína} del Imperium{/d} me soltaría basura de Comisario sobre los derechos divinos de los nobles. Ahora entiendo por qué el pueblo llano l{mf|e|a} considera {mf|un héroe|una heroína}».

languages.text: "Ich dachte, ein {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}Held des Imperiums{/d} würde mir einen Vortrag über das göttliche Recht des Adels halten. Jetzt verstehe ich, warum Euch die einfachen Leuten für {mf|einen Helden|eine Heldin} halten."
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some Commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: "Ich dachte, ein {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}Held des Imperiums{/d} würde mir einen Vortrag über das göttliche Recht des Adels halten. Jetzt verstehe ich, warum Euch die einfachen Leuten für {mf|einen Helden|eine Heldin} halten.

languages.text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国の英雄{/d}だと思っていたのに、貴族の神聖なる権利について、コミッサールのようなことを言ってくるなんて。庶民が君を英雄と呼ぶ理由がわかったわ。」
languages.original_text: "I thought a {d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}hero of the Imperium{/d} would feed me some commissar claptrap about the divine right of the nobles. Now I see why common folk call you a hero."

traits.locale_text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:CharGen_MOT_GreatDeed}帝国の英雄{/d}だと思っていたのに、貴族の神聖なる権利について、コミッサールのようなことを言ってくるなんて。庶民が君を英雄と呼ぶ理由がわかったわ。」
